coverage: Every reachable node type across all four active modifier roots has a browser handler.
materialParity: The embroidery root renders its authored sitch.001 shader: FACE-domain RGB col drives Principled Base Color, while metallic, roughness, IOR, full transmission, POINT mapping, diagonal sine Wave, and derivative Bump are preserved. A stabilized Blender reference freezes the exact cyclic hat-front dependency and evaluates authored transforms before making a local presentation snapshot. Blender and WebGL now use the same bundled studio.exr environment and matched square camera: topology remains exact at 188,934 / 188,160, silhouette IoU is 0.9092, pixel luminance MAE is 0.0365, and macro luminance MAE is 0.0395. The bill/front new dad material remains source-data blocked because its six image textures plus the separate logo PSD are external and absent from the supplied pack.
validation: All four roots are topology-exact. Typed/derived Object Info dependency metadata prepares the exact 60,105 / 59,680 evaluated hat-front shell, the evaluation cycle guard treats its reverse embroidery reference as unavailable while the dependency cooks, and Blender-compatible per-spline Length sampling restores the exact stitch and fuzz placement counts. Embroidery evaluates procedurally at Blender's 188,934 vertices / 188,160 faces; no final embroidery mesh is embedded.
